headline: Sandro Tonali
body: 🚨💣 EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham agree record deal to sign Sandro Tonali from Newcastle, HERE WE GO! 💥 Agreement between clubs closed and also on player side with the Italian midfielder. 🇮🇹 Fee higher than £85m paid for Mateus Fernandes.
raw_text:
🚨💣 EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham agree record deal to sign Sandro Tonali from Newcastle, HERE WE GO! 💥

Agreement between clubs closed and also on player side with the Italian midfielder. 🇮🇹

Fee higher than £85m paid for Mateus Fernandes.
text:
🚨💣 EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham agree record deal to sign Sandro Tonali from Newcastle, HERE WE GO! 💥

Agreement between clubs closed and also on player side with the Italian midfielder. 🇮🇹

Fee higher than £85m paid for Mateus Fernandes.
draft_caption:
✅ TRANSFER- SANDRO TONALI CONFIRMED TRANSFER FROM NEWCASTLE UNITED TO TOTTENHAM.
💰 PRICE — £85M
📝 CONTRACT — TBD

#THFC #NUFC #TransferNews #PremierLeague
